titles.title: There Is Power In The Name of Jesus

authors.author: Noel Richards
Noel Richards
Es ist Kraft in dem Namen Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A mother barely twenty Out there in her own A teenage boy in prison before He's even grown An illness of a love one A widow no one calls There is one solution One answer for it all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is Power in the Name of Jesus There is Hope There is Strength and victory to claim There is Healing in His Holy Presence There is Power in His Name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A nation needing healing Fighting for her life A church that needs revival A broken man and wife But inthe name of Jesus The chains of bondage fall Prayers are heard And answered when God's Children call
